title: 毎日杯の後に・行雲流水

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(This is it! All of my opponents have fallen behind
me!)

text_block_list.name: Oguri Fan
text_block_list.text: You got this, Oguriiiii! Keep going!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(I can feel her closing in behind me! What
ludicrous speed!)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Not on my watch! Hyaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki! It's Yaeno Muteki! Yaeno Muteki
has taken first!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I won!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(Still, Oguri's burst of speed during the final
stretch was unbelievable...)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(Yet I never once sensed any form of blistering
passion from her during the race.)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(Her stride was relaxed yet honed... just like
pristine, flowing waters.)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: (Her running style is nothing like mine.)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
...But I still felt the power within it. I'm sure she
and I will do battle again one day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki doesn't seem particularly elated
over her victory. When she returns to the waiting
room, she's her usual stoic self.
choice_data_list: Congrats! That was a great run!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. I was able to run without overexerting
myself today.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I was much more stable than I was at my debut,
and I successfully controlled the blaze fierce with
the waters still.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
At this rate, I may even be able to take the
Satsuki Sho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki's confidence is evident in her
fearless smile. She seems to have gained valuable
experience for the upcoming Satsuki Sho!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, without any delay, we start training for
the race.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Yaeno! What a coincidence. Are you planning
to go for a jog too?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Yes. It's my warm-up.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Before I forget, congratulations on winning
the Mainichi Hai!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Thank you very much.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
The commentators on TV had nothing but high
praise for you! They were calling you a promising
challenger for the Classics!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I actually screamed with joy when I heard them
say that!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: But to tell you the truth—huh?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Ardan just got out of a taxi. I wonder where she's
coming from...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Hey, Ardaaan!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Ardan! Did you just get back from somewhere?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Yes, I was at the hospital.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Are you feeling unwell?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
No, I was only there for my regular checkup.
However...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I have decided not to enter the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
The strain from my debut race has lasted longer
than expected...I require more time to recover.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
It will be difficult to reach peak condition in time
for the Satsuki Sho, so I have decided to take my
chances on my ultimate goal instead.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I seek glory equal to that of my famed sister, who
made history.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I shall take the highest honor a classic-year racer
can... I speak of course of the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: The Japanese Derby!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Yes. I plan to use this time to thoroughly prepare
myself for the Derby.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
My body may be as fragile as glass, but I have not
the slightest intention of losing. I will focus all of
my energy on the Derby from now on.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I shall also be keeping a close eye on how the two
of you run at the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Of course. Make sure to watch carefully.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I will. Now, if you'll excuse me.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Even if she isn't there, it doesn't change what I
must do.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I must win the Satsuki Sho!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
D-don't count me out just yet! I'm not gonna let
you beat me!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Until we meet at the Satsuki Sho, then.
